id.description: Stable kebab-case id, unique within this plan.

worktree.description: Worktree name (must match one in the input).

title.description: One-line, imperative outcome for this task.

assigned_to.description: Agent id from the worktree's agents list, OR null if no suitable agent. Stages that consume this MUST handle null.

blockedBy.description: Task ids in this plan that must complete first. Use for cross-target dependencies (e.g. the consumer waits for the producer's contract).

expected_artifacts.description: Paths (relative to the task's worktree) that the dispatcher should verify exist after the task finishes. If any are missing the task is marked failed even if claude -p exited 0. May be an empty array when the work has no file-shaped output.
